settings.heroTitle: World-class mobile apps for ambitious teams.
settings.heroLead: AppVion Studio designs and engineers polished Android Native, Kotlin Multiplatform, and AI-ready products that look expensive, feel effortless, and hold up under real business pressure.
settings.metaTitle: AppVion Studio | Android, Kotlin Multiplatform & AI-Ready App Agency
settings.metaDescription: AppVion Studio designs and builds premium Android Native, Kotlin Multiplatform, operational, and AI-ready mobile products for ambitious teams.
settings.proofText: Product experience across field operations, university systems, attendance workflows, events, secure web layers, and finance concepts.
settings.ctaTitle: Bring a serious mobile product idea. Leave with a sharper path.
settings.ctaBody: Tell us what you want to build, what workflow is breaking, or what existing app needs a premium upgrade. AppVion will help turn it into a focused product direction.
settings.footerTagline: Elite mobile products, operational systems, and future-ready app experiences.

projects.title: WUM Connect
projects.description: Role-based communication with real-time announcements, Firebase architecture, and offline-friendly usage.
projects.visualDetail: Sent to 4 active roles with offline sync.

projects.title: Attendance Management
projects.description: Large-list browsing, record clarity, and Paging 3 implementation for smoother institutional workflows.

projects.title: Sports Society Events
projects.description: Mobile event coordination with filtering, structured updates, and participant-facing activity flows.

services.title: Mobile Product Strategy
services.description: Define the product thesis, core workflow, feature priority, monetization shape, and launch path before code gets expensive.

services.title: Premium Android Apps
services.description: Native Android products with Compose-driven interfaces, refined interactions, scalable structure, and crisp mobile ergonomics.

services.title: Kotlin Multiplatform Systems
services.description: Shared business logic and durable architecture for teams that want cleaner delivery across platforms without duplicated complexity.

services.title: AI-Ready Interfaces
services.description: Intelligent workflows, command surfaces, automation-ready UX, and data-aware interaction patterns built with restraint.

services.title: Product Redesigns
services.description: Transform dated apps into premium experiences with sharper hierarchy, smoother flows, better trust signals, and cleaner UI systems.

services.title: Operational Tools
services.description: Dispatch, approvals, tracking, secure content, attendance, communication, and internal systems built for repeat daily use.

processSteps.title: Signal Audit
processSteps.description: We map the business model, user roles, core workflows, risk areas, and the few screens that must feel exceptional.

processSteps.title: Product Blueprint
processSteps.description: Information architecture, feature sequencing, data model direction, and interface system are aligned before build sprints.

processSteps.title: Design Engineering
processSteps.description: UI, motion, backend integration, state handling, and product logic come together in focused releases.

processSteps.title: Launch Refinement
processSteps.description: Polish, QA, deployment support, analytics readiness, and post-launch improvement loops keep the product moving.

metrics.description: Portfolio products and concepts presented with demos or clear product scope.
Core domains covered: operations, education, events, and finance-oriented systems.
Founder-led accountability path from strategy to implementation review.
Fast first response target for qualified strategy conversations.

choiceReasons.title: Founder-level thinking
choiceReasons.description: Strategy stays close to execution, so decisions move fast and the product does not drift into agency theater.

choiceReasons.title: Mobile-first obsession
choiceReasons.description: The interface is planned for thumbs, glances, permissions, loading states, empty states, and daily operational use.

choiceReasons.title: Premium perception design
choiceReasons.description: Visual hierarchy, motion, contrast, and spacing are used to create confidence before a user reads every word.

choiceReasons.title: Modern architecture
choiceReasons.description: Compose, Kotlin Multiplatform, Supabase, Firebase, Ktor, and SQLDelight patterns for products that can evolve.

engagements.title: Product Clarity Sprint
engagements.description: Best for founders or teams who need scope, user flows, feature priority, and a realistic launch roadmap before hiring build work.
engagements.items:
Workflow map
Feature priority
Tech direction

engagements.title: Premium App Build
engagements.description: Best for serious mobile products that need strategy, UI, Android/KMP engineering, backend integration, and launch refinement.
engagements.items:
Compose UI system
API/backend integration
Release support

engagements.title: Redesign & Scale
engagements.description: Best for existing apps that feel dated, confusing, slow, or hard to trust and need a premium product experience upgrade.
engagements.items:
UX audit
Interface redesign
Architecture review

insights.title: Why premium apps feel calmer before they feel beautiful.
insights.excerpt: Trust comes from rhythm, spacing, hierarchy, and fast recognition of what matters next.

insights.title: How KMP helps teams move faster without making the product brittle.
insights.excerpt: Shared logic can reduce duplication while keeping the native interface precise and responsive.

insights.title: The mobile screens that decide whether a product feels enterprise-ready.
insights.excerpt: Onboarding, status, empty states, permissions, and review flows carry more trust than decoration.

faqs.question: What type of projects is AppVion Studio best for?
faqs.answer: Mobile apps, operational systems, founder-led MVPs, internal business tools, Android Native products, Kotlin Multiplatform builds, and premium redesigns.

faqs.question: Can you build both design and development?
faqs.answer: Yes. The studio can shape product strategy, interface direction, Android/KMP engineering, backend integration, and launch refinement in one focused workflow.

faqs.question: Do you work with international clients?
faqs.answer: Yes. The site is set up for remote-first conversations through email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, and structured project briefs.

faqs.question: How should a client start?
faqs.answer: The best start is a short brief with the product idea, target users, required platforms, current stage, budget range, and preferred launch timeline.
